subcodes.first_line: O leaf attracted by the fragrances of God! Thy letter was read and perused with utmost grief and sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه بنفحات الله نامه ات قرائت گردید و در نهایت حزن و حسرت تلاوت شد
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
